issue_body: Currently, a closure is being allocated in SerilogLoggerProvider (see https://github.com/serilog/serilog-extensions-logging/blob/dev/src/Serilog.Extensions.Logging/Extensions/Logging/SerilogLoggerProvider.cs#L107). We're working on optimizing memory usage, so avoiding extra allocations is important to us. The closure allocation happens on every log event, which adds unnecessary GC pressure in high-throughput logging scenarios.
